name: obligatory_ai_generated_comment_guideline

# Obligatory AI-Generated Comment Guideline

Use this skill whenever you create a new file or a new class.

## Mandatory rule

For every newly created file and every newly created class, include the exact text:

`generated by AI in Github cloud`

## Placement

- Add the text near the top of each new file.
- Add the same text in or directly above each new class definition.
- Keep the text exact (same casing and spacing).
